title: MurthyAudio: Consular Nonimmigrant Visa Issues - Murthy Law Firm | U.S Immigration Law
content:
## MurthyAudio: Consular Nonimmigrant Visa Issues
Issues that come up at the U.S. Consulate when obtaining a nonimmigrant visa are discussed by attorneys from the Murthy Law Firm and our affiliate, Murthy Immigration Services, Pvt. Ltd, Chennai, India, in this podcast.
The MP3 is available here and soon can be found in the archive of our podcasts and teleconferences on iTunes . Find more topics under the MurthyAudio tab on our homepage .
